texto: You're a hope-killer. 'Cause at least if you'd done it on your back, that's something we c'n understand. Something we c'n do ourselves. But kindness? Luck like that-- it's a million-to-one chance, and you already took the one chance going.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Michelle Diener: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “You're a hope-killer. 'Cause at least if you'd done it on your back, that's something we c'n unde…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, luck, something pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
